creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
I've pushed the refreshed patched onto https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48228
- Fixed merge conflicts
- removal of ocaml:wash on ocaml-zip
- updated devel/ocaml-domain-name


Tested on 15 amd64 by rebuilding all ocaml ports.
Test on 15 armv7 is still in progress, looks good so far.
